/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -fopenmp -g CMakeFiles/HyraxTest.dir/test/HyraxTest.cu.o CMakeFiles/HyraxTest.dir/cmake_device_link.o -o HyraxTest   -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs  -L/usr/local/cuda/targets/x86_64-linux/lib  libzkLLMd.a depends/libsnark/libsnark/libsnarkd.a depends/libsnark/depends/libff/libff/libffd.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgmpxx.so -lcrypto -lcudadevrt -lcudart_static -lrt -lpthread -ldl
